name: Scalloped Sliced Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice tomatoes and overlap slices in two rows in a buttered 12 x 8 x 2-inch casserole. Set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, melt butter. Add celery and onion. Saute for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in salt, sugar, basil, and pepper.
4. Spoon all but 1/4 cup of the celery mixture over the tomatoes.
5. Toss croutons with the reserved 1/4 cup of celery mixture and spoon down the center of the casserole between tomatoes.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees until tomatoes are cooked, about 30 minutes.
